summary: Tested 4 features: Remove.bg API, Duplicate Product, Export Reports, Weather API. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Duplicate Product working, Export buttons only in FoodStoreDashboard not in regular seller dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: Export buttons (Excel/PDF) are only available in FoodStoreDashboard.js (/food/dashboard) via SellerAnalytics component. The regular product seller dashboard at /seller/dashboard uses SellerAdAnalytics which does NOT have export buttons.
integration_issues.priority: MEDIUM - Consider adding export buttons to SellerPages.js for product sellers

action_items: Consider adding SellerAnalytics component with export buttons to SellerPages.js for product sellers, or create export buttons in existing SellerAdAnalytics component
critical_code_review_comments: SellerAnalytics.js with export buttons is imported in FoodStoreDashboard.js but NOT in SellerPages.js - product sellers cannot access export functionality
SellerPages.js uses SellerAdAnalytics (advertising analytics) which lacks export functionality

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Duplicate feature working, Export buttons not accessible for product sellers

context_for_next_testing_agent: Features status: (1) Remove.bg API - WORKING, backend returns premium_available:true, API key configured (2) Duplicate Product - WORKING for product sellers at /seller/dashboard, copy button visible and opens AddProductModal with '(نسخة)' in name (3) Export Reports - BACKEND WORKING, FRONTEND ISSUE: Export buttons only in FoodStoreDashboard.js not SellerPages.js (4) Weather API - WORKING, OpenWeatherMap key validated

removebg_api.verified: premium_available: true when REMOVE_BG_API_KEY is set

duplicate_product.verified: 100 copy buttons found, modal opens with '(نسخة)' suffix

export_reports.issue: Export buttons only available to food sellers at /food/dashboard, not product sellers at /seller/dashboard

weather_api.verified: OpenWeatherMap API returns weather data for Damascus
